A $50M securities litigation case typically incurs $5–$10M in review attorney fees; AI reduces this to $500K–$1M. Everlaw's AI is processing 500M+ documents annually; LLM-native review workflows are replacing traditional TAR (Technology-Assisted Review) entirely.

The primary disruption is not to Palantir or Leidos (protected by clearance and certification requirements) but to the 30,000+ all-source analysts whose reports are being partially automated.

thesis: Patient engagement today is one-way blasts (appointment SMS, portal forms) that get <30% response. Voice + chat agents that conduct empathetic multi-turn conversations in 30+ languages — for intake, pre-op prep, post-discharge follow-up, and chronic care check-ins — unlock outcomes and revenue health systems literally cannot staff for. Hippocratic AI proved enterprises will sign $9.99/hour AI nurse contracts; the platform layer is wide open.

signals.description: Hippocratic AI raised at $1.6B valuation for AI nursing agents

supplyChain.keyInsight: Health systems pay $40–80/hour for care coordinators who complete 6–8 outreach calls per hour. AI agents at $10/hour completing 60+ calls per hour deliver an order-of-magnitude shift in unit economics that incumbents bolted onto SaaS pricing cannot offer.
supplyChain.bestInsertionPoint: Land in one care pathway (e.g. orthopedic post-op, oncology adherence) with measurable outcome lift, then expand to system-wide care coordination.

productArchitecture.dataIngestion: EHR FHIR feeds (Epic, Cerner, athena); ADT events; remote monitoring telemetry; voice + chat transcripts
productArchitecture.deploymentModel: HITRUST + HIPAA SaaS; on-prem voice infrastructure for large IDNs
productArchitecture.buildVsBuy: Buy LLMs + voice infra; build clinical safety layer, EHR integrations, and per-pathway conversation flows
